account_payment.insufficient_another_car: Use balance, then another card/default account for the rest
account_payment.insufficient_credit: Use balance, then credit for the rest
account_payment.insufficient_label: If the selected balance is not enough
account_payment.insufficient_stop: Stop and let me change method
account_payment.split_hint: If you choose a split, the app creates one balance row and one remaining-route row.
accounts.aliases_hint: Matched against the transaction account field.
accounts.cards_hint: Cards are instruments linked to this account. Archiving a card does not affect old transactions.
accounts.category_aliases_hint: Used for blank-account category shadow movements.
accounts.close_account_confirm: Close/archive this account? History will be kept, but the account will stop being selectable for new flows.
accounts.close_account_hint: Run safety checks before closing. Closing archives the account and keeps its history.
accounts.confirm_nonzero_closure: I understand this may close an account with a non-zero balance
accounts.create_description: The default routing is the separate-wallet style: explicit spending is outside the global net, while old blank-account category matches stay in the global net and appear here as shadow top-ups.
accounts.credit_pending_hint: Only used when this account uses Credit / pending logic.
accounts.hero_description: Accounts are loaded from your {file}. Blank old transactions keep affecting the global net, while matching categories can also create shadow movements in the matching account.
accounts.reconcile_hint: This creates a balancing movement on this account only.
accounts.reconcile_title: Reconcile {account} to the real amount you have
accounts.routing_details_hint: Renaming or archiving this account does not rewrite old CSV rows. Aliases keep old account names resolvable.
accounts.title: Conti Correnti
analysis.title: Analysis
app.name: Money Manager
auth.login.heading: Money Manager
auth.login.subtitle: Log in to open your personal money data.
auth.login.title: Login | Money Manager
auth.register.first_user_note: Your existing flat files will be copied into this first user's folder. The old files are kept untouched.
auth.register.heading: Create user
auth.register.subtitle: Each user gets a private folder under {folder}.
auth.register.title: Register | Money Manager
backup.description: Export only this user's files, or restore this user from a Money Manager backup ZIP.
backup.import_confirm: Importing will replace the current user's data after creating an automatic backup. Continue?
backup.import_warning: Import creates an automatic pre-import backup, then replaces this user's data. It never changes login/password data.
backup.title: Backup, export and import
bonifico.description: Record a bank-transfer-style payment and link it to a saved contact or a manual recipient.
bonifico.existing_contact_hint: When selected, the app snapshots the saved bank details into the transaction.
bonifico.manual_recipient_hint: Use this if the recipient is not in contacts yet.
bonifico.masked_contact_hint: Sensitive contact data is masked because Profile preferences disable full display. The transaction still stores the contact snapshot server-side.
bonifico.save_as_contact_hint: If checked, the typed recipient and bank fields are added to your private contacts.json first.
bonifico.select_debt_hint: The app fills the remaining amount and selects the matching contact when possible. Edit the amount for a partial payment.
bonifico.select_payable_hint: The app fills the remaining amount and selects the matching contact when possible. Edit the amount for a partial payment.
bonifico.source_account_hint: Credit-card routes are excluded because a bonifico should come from a bank/wallet source.
bonifico.status_recorded: Bonifico recorded as a Money Manager expense. No real transfer was executed.
bonifico.status_recorded_created_contact: Bonifico recorded and the recipient was saved as a new contact. No real transfer was executed.
bonifico.status_recorded_debt: Bonifico recorded and the selected debt balance was reduced. No real transfer was executed.
bonifico.status_recorded_payable: Bonifico recorded and the selected payable balance was reduced. No real transfer was executed.
bonifico.target_type_hint: Debt and Payable modes reduce the linked remaining balance after the transfer is recorded.
bonifico.title: Bonifico
bonifico.warning: This records the payment in Money Manager. It does not execute a real bank transfer.
cache.actions_hint: Clear is safe: the app can rebuild these values from the real data files. Rebuild warms common dashboard/account calculations.
cache.clear_confirm: Clear all cache files for this user?
cache.description: Disposable precomputed calculations that make dashboards, accounts, and analysis pages faster without becoming the source of truth.
cache.title: Cache
common.name: Name
contacts.empty_description: Save people and company bank details here now; bank-transfer transactions will use them in the next step.
contacts.form_description: Store only the details you need. IBAN is normalized by removing spaces and keeping the canonical value per user.
contacts.hero_description: Contacts are saved in your private {file} file and will be ready for future bank-transfer-style transactions.
contacts.iban_hint: Spaces are allowed while typing; the saved value is stored without spaces.
contacts.iban_masked_hint: IBANs are masked here because sensitive data display is disabled in Profile preferences.
contacts.no_bank_details: No bank details saved for this contact.
contacts.profile_card_description: Save people and company bank details for future bank transfers.
contacts.status_archived: Contact archived. It is hidden from the active list but can be restored.
contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.warning_duplicate_iban: Warning: another contact already uses the same IBAN. The contact was saved, but check it before using it.
contacts.warning_duplicate_name: Warning: another contact already has the same display name. The contact was saved, but check for duplicates.
currency.active_hint: Shown in the Add Transaction currency dropdown.
currency.add_hint: Use a 3-letter code. You can refresh rates later; the correction factor stays manual.
currency.applied_example: If you input 100 USD and the effective rate is 0.920000, the transaction is saved as € 92.00.
currency.base_hint: All transaction amounts are stored as EUR.
currency.description: EUR is the base currency. Transaction amounts are saved in EUR, while the original foreign amount and rate are written into the transaction description.
currency.description_rate_hint: The description will include the original amount, the web/manual rate, the correction, and the final effective rate.
currency.rate_explanation: Rate to EUR means 1 unit of that currency is worth this many EUR. Correction is added to the rate, so you can manually compensate small exchange differences.
currency.rate_table: EUR rate table with correction factor
currency.title: Currency Exchange
dashboard.title: Dashboard
data_registry.description: Central list of system, app, user, and cache files with schema, backup, cache, and future encryption policy.
data_registry.title: Data registry
integrity.compatibility_warnings_hint: These are the most important account/payment references to review now.
integrity.confirm_safe_repair: I confirm safe repair can write missing files, columns and unambiguous snapshots.
integrity.description: Validate account, payment method, transaction, ledger, backup and profile references without changing data.
integrity.ledger_preview_hint: Preview which transactions would need ledger rows. This does not rewrite balances.
integrity.safe_repair_confirm: Run safe repairs? This will only apply non-destructive fixes.
integrity.safe_repair_hint: Creates missing files/columns and fills identifiers/snapshots only when unambiguous. It does not rewrite historical balances.
integrity.status_hint: Errors block clean integrity. Warnings need review.
integrity.title: Integrity check
integrity.warnings_hint: Compatibility or migration issues to review.
notifications.empty_description: Due payments, old debts, old payables and recurring checks will appear here.
notifications.title: Notifications
onboarding.description: Add the essentials now. You can change everything later from Profile.
onboarding.initial_balance_hint: Saved as the main account opening balance, not as a fake transaction.
onboarding.reopen_description: Reopen the first-login setup wizard when you want to reset the basics.
onboarding.title: Set up Money Manager
overview.title: Overview
payments.name_placeholder: Example: Debit card, PayPal via credit card
payments.settings_hint: Create and edit the payment routes used by forms and the ledger routing service.
privacy.indicator_masking: Sensitive amounts and bank details are hidden in the interface.
privacy.indicator_revealed: Sensitive data is currently visible because Show sensitive data is enabled.
profile.accounts_summary_hint: IBANs are masked here. Edit them from each account detail page.
profile.avatar_description: Images stay inside your user folder, not public static files.
profile.bank_fields_migrated_hint: These old values are kept read-only for compatibility. Edit bank, IBAN and BIC/SWIFT on the account settings page.
profile.default_routes_hint: Choose the real current account and default payment method used by forms when no better choice is available.
profile.hero_description: Manage your money profile, avatar, privacy settings, app theme and language from one protected page.
profile.identity_description: This is stored in your private {file}.
profile.manage_money_model_hint: Bank account ownership and payment behavior are managed here, not in the profile identity fields.
profile.navigation_description: Hide pages, restore them later, and reorder sidebar links. Stored in your private {file}.
profile.navigation_group_hint: Controls the default open or collapsed state in the sidebar.
profile.no_iban_on_account: No IBAN saved on this account
profile.privacy_mode_hint: Allows pages to mask sensitive values where supported.
profile.show_sensitive_data_hint: Keep full values visible when privacy mode is off.
profile.status.avatar_empty: The selected image appears to be empty.
profile.status.avatar_type: Avatar must be a PNG, JPG, JPEG, or WEBP image.
profile.status.backup_invalid: This ZIP is not a valid or safe Money Manager backup.
profile.status.backup_missing: Choose a backup ZIP before importing.
profile.status.backup_restore_failed: Import failed before your current data was replaced.
profile.status.backup_type: Only ZIP backup files can be imported.
profile.title: Profile
security.change_password_description: Changing the password re-encrypts the data key with the new password. It does not decrypt and re-encrypt every data file.
security.description: Encrypt your Money Manager data folder and manage the in-memory user vault.
security.enable_warning: This creates a backup, derives a key from your password, encrypts sensitive JSON/CSV files and documents, and keeps the decrypted key only in server memory. If you lose the password, encrypted data cannot be recovered without a recovery key.
security.password_lost_warning: If encryption is enabled and the password is lost, the encrypted files cannot be decrypted.
security.title: Security
security.unlock_description: Your data is encrypted. Re-enter your password to decrypt files in memory for this session.
transactions.title: Transactions
transfers.description: Move money between configured accounts without counting it as income or expense.
transfers.description_placeholder: Example: ATM withdrawal, top up wallet, moved money to another account
transfers.fee_hint: Optional. If configured, the fee is saved as a separate expense and ledger movement.
transfers.log_hint: Click a row on desktop to edit/delete in the side window.
transfers.target_hint: If the target account has a configured top-up fee, it is recorded automatically.
transfers.title: Internal Transfers
updates.description: Stage local update packages, inspect install paths, and prepare rollback safely. Code updates are applied by the launcher on next start, not while Flask is running.
updates.inbox_hint: Place update ZIP files in the inbox folder. Each ZIP must contain update_manifest.json and an app/ folder.
updates.no_packages: No update packages found in the inbox.
updates.rollback_confirm: Rollback restores code only and will be applied on the next launcher start. Continue?
updates.rollback_hint: Rollback restores code only. It does not restore user data. If an update migrated data forward, restore a matching backup manually before using old code.
updates.title: Updates
updates.update_staged: Update staged. Restart the launcher to apply it.
yearly.title: Yearly Summary
